name: PrescriptionSplitReason
description: This is a reason assigned by a pharmacy management system user at the moment when they "split" a prescription.

concepts.name: BackOrder
concepts.enDisplayName: Product prescribed is on back order
concepts.frDisplayName: Produit prescrit en rupture de stock
concepts.description: Product prescribed is on back order

concepts.name: NotAvailable
concepts.enDisplayName: Product prescribed is not commercially available (default)
concepts.description: Product prescribed is not commercially available (default)

concepts.name: NotCovered
concepts.enDisplayName: Product prescribed is not covered by patient’s insurance
concepts.frDisplayName: Produit prescrit pas couvert par assurance du patient
concepts.description: Product prescribed is not covered by patient’s insurance

concepts.name: Other
concepts.enDisplayName: Patient preference, Tapering dose, Other (with free text option)
concepts.frDisplayName: Préférence du patient, diminution progressive, autre (texte libre)
concepts.description: Patient preference, Tapering dose, Other (with free text option)
